name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Reverse Shell Command Line
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious shell commands or program code that may be executed or used in command line to establish a reverse shell.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Reverse Shell Command Line
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious shell commands or program code that may be executed or used in command line to establish a reverse shell


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Reverse Shell Command Line on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE 'BEGIN {s = _/inet/tcp/0/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'bash -i >& /dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'sh -i >$ /dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'sh -i >$ /dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE '&& while read line 0<&5; do' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/bash -c exec 5<>/dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/bash -c exec 5<>/dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -e /bin/sh ' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/sh | nc' OR "Command" ILIKE 'rm -f backpipe; mknod /tmp/backpipe p && nc ' OR "Command" ILIKE ';socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname(_tcp_));if(connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i))))' OR "Command" ILIKE ';STDIN->fdopen($c,r);$~->fdopen($c,w);system$_ while<>;' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3' OR "Command" ILIKE 'uname -a; w; id; /bin/bash -i' OR "Command" ILIKE '$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2); $stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length); $stream.Flush()};' OR "Command" ILIKE ';os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);os.putenv(''HISTFILE'',''/dev/null'');' OR "Command" ILIKE '.to_i;exec sprintf(_/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d_,f,f,f)' OR "Command" ILIKE ';while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,_r_){|io|c.print' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat exec:''bash -li'',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:' OR "Command" ILIKE 'rm -f /tmp/p; mknod /tmp/p p &&' OR "Command" ILIKE ' | /bin/bash | telnet ' OR "Command" ILIKE ',echo=0,raw tcp-listen:' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -lvvp ' OR "Command" ILIKE 'xterm -display 1') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Reverse Shell Command Line on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE 'BEGIN {s = _/inet/tcp/0/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'bash -i >& /dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'sh -i >$ /dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'sh -i >$ /dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE '&& while read line 0<&5; do' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/bash -c exec 5<>/dev/tcp/' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/bash -c exec 5<>/dev/udp/' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -e /bin/sh ' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/sh | nc' OR "Command" ILIKE 'rm -f backpipe; mknod /tmp/backpipe p && nc ' OR "Command" ILIKE ';socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname(_tcp_));if(connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i))))' OR "Command" ILIKE ';STDIN->fdopen($c,r);$~->fdopen($c,w);system$_ while<>;' OR "Command" ILIKE '/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3' OR "Command" ILIKE 'uname -a; w; id; /bin/bash -i' OR "Command" ILIKE '$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2); $stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length); $stream.Flush()};' OR "Command" ILIKE ';os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);os.putenv(''HISTFILE'',''/dev/null'');' OR "Command" ILIKE '.to_i;exec sprintf(_/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d_,f,f,f)' OR "Command" ILIKE ';while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,_r_){|io|c.print' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat exec:''bash -li'',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:' OR "Command" ILIKE 'rm -f /tmp/p; mknod /tmp/p p &&' OR "Command" ILIKE ' | /bin/bash | telnet ' OR "Command" ILIKE ',echo=0,raw tcp-listen:' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -lvvp ' OR "Command" ILIKE 'xterm -display 1') AQL filter query
